revision.comment: support |for= alias; use quotes around words-as-words in this kind of case
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from long name
  |name=From a longer title
  |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason.
  |all category=Redirects from long names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from long name
  |name=From a longer title
  |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason.
  |all category=Redirects from long names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from long name
  |name=From a longer title
  |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason.
  |all category=Redirects from long names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from long name
  |name=From a longer title
  |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason.
  |all category=Redirects from long names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from long name
  |name=From a longer title
  |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason.
  |all category=Redirects from long names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from long name |name=From a longer title |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason. |all category=Redirects from long names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from long name |name=From a longer title |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason. |all category=Redirects from long names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from long name |name=From a longer title |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason. |all category=Redirects from long names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from long name |name=From a longer title |from=a title that is a complete, more complete or longer version of the topic's name{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the short version is: "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=It leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:COMMONNAME|common names]] and can help writing and searches. However, do not replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] unless the page is updated for another reason. |all category=Redirects from long names }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
